calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Jul-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Michael P. Thorman, Esq., appearing for and with Plaintiff and Petitioner: Yesica Hurd, sister and Conservator for a person with a disability: Gabriel Hurtado not present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $975,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $352,570.62 payable to Law Firm of Thorman & Burns
Costs: $264,691.58
A net balance of $357,737.70 to be made payable to Petitioner as trustee for the Special Needs Trust of Gabriel Hurtado, shall be made upon receipt of an order permitting desposit into the Special Needs Trust.

Court signed Order Granting approval of a person with a disability.
Status Hearing Scheduled on November 22, 2016 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into a Special Needs Trust.
No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodged with Dept. 514 prior to Hearing.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Determination Of Medi-Cal Lien
Off Calendar May-04-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Thorman of Bonjour Thorman & Burns telephone number 510-785-8400 for Plaintiff Gabriel Hurtado.
Beverley Meyers and Eric Lazarus of the Office of the State Attorney General telephone number 415-703-5545 for Third Party Department of Health Care Services.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court changed its tentative ruling. In re: PLAINTIFF GABRIEL HURTADO'S Motion For Determination Of Medi-Cal Lien - The Court will do a reduction by 75% for comparative negligence. Counsel will work on the proper calculations and prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
